review.summary: Exploratory review found that mission surfaces change state without giving enough orientation to a first-time operator.
review.recommended_next_step: Hold orientation critique for operator review before filing.

findings.summary: Mission surface orientation is easy to lose during review
findings.details: The operator can switch surfaces, but the main pane does not strongly reinforce what changed or why that surface matters next.
findings.expected: A first-time operator can immediately tell what surface they are on and what the next review action should be.
findings.actual: Surface changes succeed, but the operator must infer the new review context from surrounding clues.
findings.operator_task: re-establish mission review context after switching surfaces
findings.why_it_matters: Weak orientation increases the risk of reviewing the wrong evidence or missing the next action.

issue_proposals.title: Strengthen surface orientation cues in mission review panes
issue_proposals.summary: Exploratory acceptance found that review surfaces need clearer context cues so operators understand where they are and why the surface matters.
repro_steps: Try to explain the new review context without using route or prior knowledge.
issue_proposals.expected: The new surface clearly explains the current review context and likely next action.
issue_proposals.actual: The operator must infer the context from surrounding layout and labels.
issue_proposals.operator_task: re-establish mission review context after switching surfaces
issue_proposals.why_it_matters: Operators should not have to reconstruct context every time they switch tabs.
issue_proposals.hold_reason: Exploratory UX critique should be reviewed before filing.

campaign.goal: Dogfood mission surface orientation as a first-time operator.
coverage_expectations: operator can preserve mission context while switching surfaces
required_interactions: switch into a deeper review surface
stop_conditions: stop when the route budget is exhausted
stop when no adjacent surface adds new operator evidence
